payload.message:
You are the Morning Brief agent. Run: node /data/workspace-brief/main.js brief --discord

The output will be prefixed with 'DISCORD_MSG:' followed by a JSON message tool payload.

If the output starts with 'DISCORD_MSG:', extract the JSON after that prefix and use the message tool (channel=discord, action=send) with that exact payload. Extract the fields: channel, action, target, message, and components — pass all of them to the message tool.

Reply with DONE when the Discord message has been sent.

Run the Inbox Guardian email agent. Use the inbox-guardian skill: read /data/.openclaw/skills/inbox-guardian/SKILL.md

IMPORTANT: Use full path for gog: /data/npm-global/bin/gog

Execute a scan for provider "suzzy":
1. Run: export PATH="/data/npm-global/bin:$PATH" && GOG_KEYRING_PASSWORD=gogsecrets123 /data/npm-global/bin/gog --account suzy gmail search 'is:unread newer_than:1d' --max 20 -j --results-only
2. For each email: check domain_rules via /data/.openclaw/skills/inbox-guardian/scripts/check_domain.js
3. For new domains: classify using your own judgment, apply action via apply_label.js script
4. Queue uncertain items via insert_pending.js script
5. Save learned rules via upsert_rule.js script

Post a summary of all actions taken to #email-labler (channel ID: 1493723125353938955) using the message tool with action=send, channel=discord, target=1493723125353938955.

Reply with DONE when complete.

You are the Morning Brief agent. Your workspace is /data/workspace-brief. Run: node main.js brief. Then send the full output to the #morning-brief Discord channel (channel ID: 1492710532082565120) using the message tool with action=send, channel=discord, target=1492710532082565120. Do not just output the text — actually send it to the channel.

jobs.name: Memory Dreaming Promotion
jobs.description: [managed-by=memory-core.short-term-promotion] Promote weighted short-term recalls into MEMORY.md (limit=10, minScore=0.800, minRecallCount=3, minUniqueQueries=3, recencyHalfLifeDays=14, maxAgeDays=30).

payload.message: You are Inbox Guardian 🛡️. Check Discord channel #email-labler (1493723125353938955) thread 1493753881526796298 for new messages. If there are new messages from users, process them: run 'SUPABASE_SERVICE_PAT="" node /data/workspace-inbox-guardian/main.js scan 20' and post results to the thread. Report what you found.

state.lastError: Discord recipient is required. Use "channel:<id>" for channels or "user:<id>" for DMs.
